notes.sg-heart-failure-of-heart-failure: This is a very general label. The sample titles do not seem to be specific to heart failure.
notes.sg-heart-failure-respiratory-failure: This is a distinct condition from heart failure, though they can be related.
notes.sg-heart-failure-arrhythmogenic-right-ve: This is a specific type of cardiomyopathy, which can lead to heart failure.
notes.sg-heart-failure-cardiac-resynchronizati: This is a treatment for heart failure.
notes.sg-heart-failure-central-sleep-apnea: Central sleep apnea is a comorbidity of heart failure.
notes.sg-heart-failure-volume-overload: Volume overload can be a cause or consequence of heart failure.
